name: Butterscotch Chocolate Chunk Cookies ("David's-style")
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Semisweet chocolate (cut into coarse chunks)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees. Line two baking sheets with parchment paper.
Cream together the butter and both sugars until very well blended. Mix in the vanilla, egg, then fold in the salt, flour, and chocolate chunks.
Form the dough into small or large balls (walnut-sized or golf-ball-sized, as desired).
Place the cookies on the prepared baking sheets and press down slightly.
Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, until lightly golden. Cool on wire racks. (Makes about 2 dozen large or 4 dozen small).
